summary.business_type: Healthcare SaaS / YMYL — Medical services platform (Bangladesh)
top_findings: OG image /og-image.jpg returns 404 — all social sharing broken
Homepage title renders with 'My Doctor' twice due to template + title overlap
JSON-LD schemas (Organization, WebSite) not in initial server HTML — schema count: 0
All homepage sections are 'use client' — headings and content not in initial HTML
H1 on homepage is sr-only (visually hidden)
quick_wins: Create /public/og-image.jpg (1200x630px) — fixes all social previews immediately
Change homepage title from 'My Doctor — Trusted...' to 'Trusted...' (10 min fix)
Move Organization + WebSite schema to layout.tsx server component

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: All public pages return HTTP 200
robots.txt present, linked from sitemap
WWW to non-WWW redirect configured
5 security headers implemented (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
Canonical tags on all major pages
Dynamic sitemap with doctor + hospital slugs

findings.title: robots.txt redundant Allow directive
findings.description: Allow: /_next/static/ is redundant since Allow: / covers everything. /uploads/ blocked — verify intent.
findings.recommendation: Simplify robots.txt: keep Allow: / and Disallow: /api/. Remove redundant /_next/static/ line.

findings.title: /search page in sitemap
findings.description: Search result pages have no unique crawlable content and waste crawl budget.
findings.recommendation: Remove /search from staticRoutes in src/app/sitemap.ts

findings.title: No Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: CSP header missing. Other security headers are present.
findings.recommendation: Add CSP header in next.config.ts headers() array.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Title tags are descriptive and keyword-rich
Meta descriptions are well-crafted (130-160 chars)
Doctor profiles have credentials and ratings
FAQ section on homepage
Contact info with phone, address, email

findings.title: Homepage title duplicates brand name
findings.description: Root layout template '%s | My Doctor' + homepage title 'My Doctor — Trusted Healthcare Platform in Bangladesh' renders as 'My Doctor — Trusted Healthcare Platform in Bangladesh | My Doctor'. Confirmed in live HTML.
findings.recommendation: Change page title in src/app/(primary)/(home)/page.tsx to 'Trusted Healthcare Platform in Bangladesh' (without 'My Doctor —' prefix).

findings.title: H1 visually hidden with sr-only
findings.description: Homepage H1 'My Doctor — Book Doctors, Telemedicine & Healthcare Services in Bangladesh' uses className='sr-only'. Google can read it but visual H1s send stronger relevance signals.
findings.recommendation: Remove sr-only and integrate H1 visually into hero section, or move it to a visible position.

findings.title: All homepage sections are client components
findings.description: hero-section, specializations-section, active-doctors-section, ambulance-section, diagnostics-section, faqs-section, news-section, testimonials-section all have 'use client'. H2/H3 headings and body text not in initial HTML (confirmed: 0 headings in curl output).
findings.recommendation: Convert purely display sections (StatsSection, TrustSection, HowItWorksSection, AppDownloadSection) to server components. For data-fetching sections, use RSC for data + thin client wrapper for interactivity.

findings.title: Static/hardcoded blog and nurse content
findings.description: ~5 blog posts in news.data.ts, ~8 nurses in nurse-details.data.ts, ~46 telemedicine specializations — all hardcoded. Not scalable for content authority.
findings.recommendation: Consider CMS integration for blogs and nurse profiles, or at minimum expand static content.

findings.title: No hreflang for Bengali
findings.description: Site targets Bangladesh audience but only has lang='en'. No Bengali (bn-BD) alternate.
findings.recommendation: Add hreflang alternate if Bengali content exists or is planned.

findings.title: Blog posts lack author attribution
findings.description: Blog articles have no author name or credentials. YMYL health content requires strong E-E-A-T.
findings.recommendation: Add author name and credentials to news.data.ts and render them on blog pages.

findings.title: Twitter and LinkedIn links are invalid (#)
findings.description: SITE.links.twitter = '#' and SITE.links.linkedin = '#' — these appear in schema sameAs arrays as invalid URLs.
findings.recommendation: Update src/config/site.ts with real profile URLs or remove from schema sameAs.

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Title tags keyword-rich with location signals (Bangladesh, Dhaka)
Meta descriptions action-oriented
Keywords arrays defined per page
OpenGraph + Twitter Card tags on all pages
Canonical URLs on all public pages

findings.title: OG image returns 404 — all social sharing broken
findings.description: https://mydoctor.com.bd/og-image.jpg returns HTTP 404. File /public/og-image.jpg does not exist. Referenced by ALL pages via SITE.ogImage.
findings.recommendation: Create /public/og-image.jpg at 1200x630px. Update Organization schema logo to use /logo.svg.

findings.title: og:title in root layout doesn't use template
findings.description: Root layout openGraph.title = SITE.name = 'My Doctor' — this static value is used as fallback for pages without OG override, but the title template doesn't apply to OG.
findings.recommendation: Accept this as expected behavior — page-level metadata overrides OG title correctly.

findings.title: No og:locale tag
findings.description: No og:locale declared. Should be en_BD for English content targeting Bangladesh.
findings.recommendation: Add openGraph.locale: 'en_BD' to root layout metadata.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Organization schema on homepage (name, contactPoint, address, sameAs)
WebSite schema with SearchAction (Sitelinks Searchbox eligible)
Physician schema on doctor detail pages with credentials + rating
Article schema on blog pages

findings.title: JSON-LD schemas not in initial server HTML
findings.description: curl on homepage returns SCHEMA COUNT: 0. Schemas defined in page.tsx are not rendered in initial HTML due to RSC streaming behavior. Google sees schemas on JS re-render but initial crawl finds nothing.
findings.recommendation: Move Organization and WebSite schemas to src/app/layout.tsx (guaranteed server component) using dangerouslySetInnerHTML.

findings.title: Organization.logo is missing OG image (404)
findings.description: logo: 'https://mydoctor.com.bd/og-image.jpg' — file doesn't exist AND is an OG image, not a logo.
findings.recommendation: Change to 'https://mydoctor.com.bd/logo.svg' which exists in /public.

findings.title: No schema on listing pages
findings.description: /doctors, /hospitals, /specializations, /ambulances, /diagnostics have no structured data.
findings.recommendation: Add ItemList + BreadcrumbList to listing pages. Add EmergencyService to /ambulances, MedicalLaboratory to /diagnostics.

findings.title: sameAs has invalid URLs
findings.description: Twitter and LinkedIn sameAs entries are '#' — invalid.
findings.recommendation: Remove '#' entries from sameAs array in organization schema.

findings.title: No BreadcrumbList schema
findings.description: No breadcrumb structured data on any page. Breadcrumbs in SERPs improve CTR.
findings.recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList to all layout.tsx files for major routes.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: Hero image has priority={true} on first slide
Manual <link rel=preload> for hero SVG in page.tsx
Fixed aspect-ratio containers prevent layout shift
next/font with display: swap for all fonts

findings.title: Hero LCP element in client component with JS carousel
findings.description: HeroSection is 'use client' with embla-carousel Autoplay. LCP image delayed until JS hydration.
findings.recommendation: Convert carousel to server component shell. Initialize Autoplay only after hydration with useEffect.

findings.title: SVG hero images not optimized
findings.description: Next.js Image optimization does not apply to SVG files. /images/hero/01.svg bypasses Next.js pipeline.
findings.recommendation: Convert hero images to WebP/AVIF for 40-60% size reduction.

findings.title: 30+ JS script chunks on initial load
findings.description: 30 script tags detected on homepage. Heavy client bundle due to all sections being client components.
findings.recommendation: Convert static sections to server components to reduce client JS bundle.

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: AI crawlers allowed via Allow: /
FAQ section — strong AI citation target
Structured doctor data is citation-friendly
SearchAction schema enables sitelinks search

findings.title: llms.txt missing
findings.description: https://mydoctor.com.bd/llms.txt returns 404. llms.txt is the emerging standard for AI-readable site docs. ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude Web check for it.
findings.recommendation: Create /public/llms.txt with service descriptions, navigation links, and contact info.

findings.title: Homepage content not in initial HTML
findings.description: AI crawlers that don't execute JS see almost no content. FAQ, specializations, services all client-rendered.
findings.recommendation: Convert static sections to server components (see Content Quality fixes).

findings.title: No explicit AI crawler directives
findings.description: No specific rules for GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot in robots.txt. Currently all get default Allow: /.
findings.recommendation: Decide crawling policy for AI training bots and add explicit rules.

categories.name: Images
what_works: Next.js Image component used with fill, sizes, priority
Remote patterns configured for CDN domains

findings.title: og-image.jpg does not exist
findings.description: /public/og-image.jpg missing. Referenced by all pages for OG/Twitter social previews.
findings.recommendation: Create 1200x630px OG image and place at /public/og-image.jpg.

findings.title: Hero images are SVG format
findings.description: SVG bypasses Next.js Image optimization pipeline. No compression, no WebP conversion.
findings.recommendation: Convert /images/hero/01.svg and /images/hero/03.svg to WebP.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Fix homepage title — remove 'My Doctor —' prefix from page title
Move Organization + WebSite schemas to layout.tsx

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add BreadcrumbList + ItemList schema to listing pages
Convert StatsSection, TrustSection, HowItWorksSection to server components

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Add author attribution to blog posts
Add BreadcrumbList to all layout files
Reduce Hind Siliguri font weights to 2

phases.name: Phase 4: Monitoring & Iteration
items: Track CWV field data via CrUX
Monitor social sharing previews after OG image fix
Consider CMS for nurses and blog content
